summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that PSA is currently testing its Daily 100MA support zone near $300.73. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 36.4%. This is a fresh test of the support, suggesting that optimal buy-side liquidity remains intact. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $329.01. This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
